summary: Unified Dashboard Timeline Feature - All tests passed. GET /api/appointments/my-timeline endpoint returns 3 buckets (action_required, upcoming, past) with correct counts. Timeline items have all required fields including role, status, action_required, counterparty_name, actions, pending_label. Organizer items show 'Créé par vous' role label with 'En attente de réponse (N)' pending label and 'remind' action. Participant items show 'Invitation de [Name]' role label with 'Votre réponse est attendue' pending label and accept/decline actions. No duplicate items when user is both organizer and participant. Frontend dashboard renders correctly with ActionRequiredSection, TimelineCard components, tabs (À venir, Historique, Statistiques), workspace switcher, impact card, and calendar sync panel.

backend_pytest: ✅ Response contains action_required, upcoming, past buckets
✅ Response contains counts object with correct values
✅ Timeline items have all required fields (appointment_id, role, status, action_required, starts_at, sort_date, counterparty_name, is_user_organizer, is_user_participant, actions, title)
✅ Organizer items have role='organizer' and is_user_organizer=True
✅ Organizer items with pending participants have action_required=True and pending_label='En attente de réponse (N)'
✅ Organizer items with pending have 'remind' action
✅ Items sorted by date in each bucket (ascending for action_required/upcoming, descending for past)
✅ Organizer items have participants_count, accepted_count, pending_count fields
frontend_playwright: ✅ Dashboard stats show engagement count and action required count
✅ Calendar sync panel with Google Calendar toggle
✅ Action Required section displays with correct count
✅ Participant invitation shows 'Invitation de [Name]' role label
✅ Participant invitation shows 'Votre réponse est attendue' pending label
✅ Organizer items show 'Créé par vous' role label
✅ Organizer items show 'En attente de réponse (N)' pending label
✅ Tabs (À venir, Historique, Statistiques) work correctly
✅ Timeline cards display with correct badges and progress bars

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend endpoint correctly merges organizer appointments and participant invitations
✅ Deduplication logic prevents items from appearing twice when user is both organizer and participant
✅ Frontend TimelineCard and ActionCard components correctly render role labels based on is_user_organizer/is_user_participant
✅ Accept/Decline buttons correctly call invitation respond endpoint
✅ Remind button correctly calls appointment remind endpoint

success_rate.backend: 100% (15 passed, 2 skipped - no participant items for test user)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified dashboard timeline feature fully tested and working. The GET /api/appointments/my-timeline endpoint merges organizer appointments and participant invitations into 3 buckets. Frontend OrganizerDashboard.js renders ActionRequiredSection with participant invitations (Accept/Decline buttons) and organizer items (Remind button). TimelineCard component shows role labels ('Créé par vous' or 'Invitation de [Name]'). Test user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has both organizer appointments and at least one participant invitation from Igaal Hanouna.

returns.action_required: List of items requiring user action (organizer with pending OR participant with status=invited)
returns.upcoming: List of future items not requiring action
returns.counts: Object with action_required, upcoming, past, total counts

frontend_components.ActionCard: Renders participant invitations with Accept/Decline or organizer items with Remind
frontend_components.TimelineCard: Renders timeline items with role labels, badges, progress bars

mocked_apis.Stripe: Dev mode - payment methods are pm_dev_* format
